← All charges

K2 & Mwala Crushing Elephant Charge 2015

3 October 2015 · 📍 Mukwisi River

Results Checkpoints Awards Grants 🗺 Map

Conservation Grants

Funds distributed to conservation organisations from the 2015 charge.

Organisation Amount (ZMW) Purpose
Children in the Wilderness 32,000 Support school stays in parks for conservation education
Chipembele Wildlife Education Trust 32,000 Covering costs of logistics and materials for on site conservation education program
Conservation Lake Tanganyika 73,000 Provide requirements for overnight school outings in Nsumbu NP (4 trips of ave 15 children for 2 nights)
Conservation Lower Zambezi 65,000 Environmental Education Programme support
Conservation South Luangwa 65,000 Annual Conservation Fun Run & Sports Day, anti-snaring/patrols
Game Rangers International 65,000 Towards community conservation education, including popular local radio programs
Kasanka Trust 73,000 Upgrading Education / Visitor Centre and school trips to park
The Wildlife Crime Prevention Project 25,988 Building boxes for rescue & release of pangolin and supporting training visit by Lisa Hywood - a pangolin expert.
Wildlife & Environmental Conservation Society of Zambia 195,000 Support 944 Chongololo clubs and 37,760 members
Zambian Carnivore Programme 32,000 Supporting Conservation Biologist Training, Conservation Clubs, de-snaring of carnivores
Total 657,988
Elephant Charge results archive — data updated annually after each event.
elephantcharge.org
